codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/clients'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'c2f25bfd78a7fe3e7b3294dbf5f026285989fa0d7f7b73b2108305e68f64b796'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
codeExamples.emojicode:
📦 sockets 🏠

💭 Emojicode HTTP Client

💭 Run: ./example

  💭 Connection settings
  🔤localhost🔤 ➡️ host
  3011 ➡️ port
  🔤/clients🔤 ➡️ path

  💭 Build HTTP request
  🔤GET /clients HTTP/1.1❌r❌nHost: localhost:3011❌r❌nx-api-key: c2f25bfd78a7fe3e7b3294dbf5f026285989fa0d7f7b73b2108305e68f64b796❌r❌n❌r❌n🔤 ➡️ request

  💭 Connect and send
  🍺 🆕📞 host port❗ ➡️ socket
  🍺 💬 socket 📇 request❗❗
  
  💭 Read and print response
  🍺 👂 socket 4096❗ ➡️ data
  😀 🍺 🔡 data❗❗
  
  💭 Close socket
  🚪 socket❗
